metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  if p == "partstype":
              # object like "List of counties in Texas"
              obj_clean = obj.strip().strip('"')
              low = obj_clean.lower()
              if low.startswith("list of "):
                  rest = obj_clean[8:]  # after "List of "
                  if " in " in rest:
                      typ, location = rest.split(" in ", 1)
                      typ = typ.rstrip('s')  # singular form
                      return f"{subj} is a {typ} in {location}"
              return f"{subj} {obj_clean}"
          # generic fallback
with:
  if p == "partstype":
              # object like "List of counties in Texas"
              obj_clean = obj.strip().strip('"')
              low = obj_clean.lower()
              if low.startswith("list of "):
                  rest = obj_clean[8:]  # after "List of "
                  if " in " in rest:
                      typ, location = rest.split(" in ", 1)
                      typ = typ.rstrip('s')  # singular form
                      return f"is a {typ} in {location}"
              return f"{obj_clean}"
          # generic fallback
